title: 300 MAIN - 211info
text: 300 MAIN 300 MAIN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides HUD-subsidized rental housing. The complex has 7 studios and 19 one-bedroom units, 3 of which are barrier-free for wheelchair accessibility. 300 SE Main Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Age 62 and older and adults with disabilities who are mobility impaired Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-11:30am and 12:30pm-3:30pm Email (503) 630-2357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 630-2357 Main phone Main phone (503) 630-2357 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to check status of the waitlist FEES: Rent based on 30% of income DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on TriMet bus line 30 Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. 300 MAIN
